subject: Bouffalant, a large black buffalo Pokémon with a massive afro-like mane and golden horns, in a battle stance
description: A large, imposing buffalo-like Pokémon dominates the frame. It has a solid black body, a voluminous round mane of curly fur on its head, and wide curved golden-tipped horns. The creature is shown in a low, aggressive stance suggesting a charge or battle readiness. The background is dark and stormy-toned, emphasizing the creature's menacing presence. The overall impression is of raw physical power.
foreground: large black buffalo Pokémon in aggressive low stance with golden horns
